finding_results.notes: Reworked prior smell-led entries to open on weather impact, lighting/visual pressure, operational environment, and sound/tactile pressure while retaining concrete setting detail. Smell remains present only as secondary texture.
finding_results.summary: Scene-entry syntax now varies by movement, light, temperature, and sound instead of repeating smell-first construction.

finding_results.notes: Kept one fallout comment-feed list for live-audience texture and replaced the later wanted-chain with enacted action (reflection split, knuckle taps, embodied recall of pressures) to avoid mechanical rhetorical repetition.
finding_results.summary: Late-fallout rhetoric now uses one list pattern plus a dramatized action beat rather than two parallel anaphora chains.

finding_results.notes: Inserted multiple focalized interior turns during the secure-line exchange (somatic clamp, lexical judgment, memory of tracked edits, self-monitoring of voice flattening) without slowing the call tempo.
finding_results.summary: The secure-line section now carries sustained close-third interiority instead of reading as external transcript only.

finding_results.notes: Converted cited clipped emphases into complete sentences and removed remaining targeted narrative fragments while preserving pressure rhythm.
finding_results.summary: Cited anti-clipping violations were rewritten into grammatical full sentences with tone retained.

summary: All four prose/copyedit findings were addressed in-place with minimal collateral churn: diversified scene-entry vectors, reduced repeated anaphora through enacted fallout action, restored focalized interiority in the secure-line block, and resolved cited clipped-fragment violations.
